title: Legione straniera
writer: Alessandro De Stefani, Basilio Franchina, Carlo Musso
actors: Alberto Farnese, Irene Galter, Viviane Romance
plot: Alberto Gherardi, a sailor is wrongly suspected of murder, flied and enroll into the Foreign Legion. His unfaithful fiancee Irene goes to look for him with his young brother Enrico, but the latter is killed. Will she still manage ...
